title: Mayoral Development Corporations in combined authorities and combined county authorities: Guidance on legislation and scrutiny
body: "MHCLG has produced guidance in response to a recommendation made to government in the Tees Valley independent review report, published 29 January 2024.  This guidance clarifies legislation in respect of Mayoral Development Corporations, including oversight, reserve matters and consent. The guidance provides an overview of:   what a Mayoral Development Corporation is how legislation works, including consent dealing with liabilities following the closure of any subsidiary companies and clarifies the roles and responsibilities of mayoral combined and combined county authority members and officers  "
